S.FORM: == Emil Benko == Emil Benko sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, kawas tay 1913, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, Emil Benko, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == emil ОІenko == emil ОІenko s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj * nqu taj **, emil ОІenko, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
S.FORM: == Emil Benko == Emil Benko sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, kawas tay 1913, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, Emil Benko, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
